title: Attack on Titan
description:
In a world where humanity lives behind enormous walls to protect themselves from gigantic creatures known as Titans, Eren Yeager dreams of exploring the outside world beyond the safety of the city. His life changes forever when a massive Titan destroys the outer wall, allowing countless Titans to invade and massacre innocent people. After witnessing the horrifying death of his mother, Eren swears revenge and joins the military alongside his friends Mikasa Ackerman and Armin Arlert.

As the battle against the Titans grows more dangerous, Eren and his companions slowly uncover terrifying secrets about the origins of the Titans, the walls, and humanity itself. What begins as a fight for survival soon transforms into a brutal conflict filled with betrayal, war, sacrifice, and the struggle for freedom. With intense action, emotional storytelling, and shocking twists, Attack on Titan becomes a dark tale about humanity, hatred, and the cost of freedom.
